info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Transaction Processing API
info.description: The Transaction Processing API enables businesses to efficiently handle and record financial transactions. This endpoint allows users to initiate new transactions, ensuring accurate tracking and management of funds. Typical consumers include merchants and financial institutions looking to automate payment workflows or manage sales records. Integration with this API streamlines transaction processes, enhancing operational efficiency and improving financial reporting.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new transaction by submitting the required transaction details. Ensure that all mandatory fields are included in the request body to successfully create the transaction.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new transaction. It must contain the necessary information required for processing the transaction such as amount, currency, and transaction type.

200.description: Request completed successfully, transaction details included.

500.description: Unexpected server error occurred while processing the request.

404.description: Requested resource not found; the transaction does not exist.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Response

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the transaction.

accountNumber.description: Account number for the customer where the transaction occurred.

transactionType.description: Type of the transaction, e.g., deposit, withdrawal.

amount.description: Amount of money involved in the transaction.

currency.description: Currency in which the transaction amount is denominated.

status.description: Current status of the transaction, e.g., completed, pending.

message.description: Additional message or details about the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Response schema representing a transaction after a successful POST operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Error Response for POST Operation on Transactions

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the request was successful or not.

error.description: A brief error code or name indicating the type of error.

message.description: A descriptive message explaining the error.
message.example: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for how the user can rectify the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: This schema represents the structure of a 500 Internal Server Error response for a POST operation related to transactions.

example.message: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

details.message: Payment gateway timeout while processing transaction request.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.title: Error Details

accountNumber.description: The account number related to the error.

errorCode.description: The specific error code associated with the error.

message.description: A message providing more context about the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.description: Contains additional details about the error that occurred during the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Request Body

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer initiating the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The number of the account from which funds will be debited.

amount.description: The amount of money to be transferred, represented as a string.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction amount is specified (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

beneficiaryAccount.description: The account number of the beneficiary receiving the funds.

transactionDate.description: The date on which the transaction is to be processed, formatted as ISO 8601.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a new transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Error Response for Transactions POST Operation

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the request was successful (false in this case).

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message describing the error.
message.example: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

path.description: The path of the request that triggered the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error to assist with debugging.

suggestion.example: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: This schema represents the error response structure returned when a POST operation on transactions fails with a 404 status code.

example.message: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

details.message: No active account exists for the provided account number.

example.suggestion: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
